appraisal_events.evidence: « en homme habitué à donner le ton, le “la” » … « En quoi il calculait bien, car Mme de Villeparisis … ne cessa de lui faire fête. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Charlus as someone who sets the social key and is effectively obeyed; his performative approval reshapes the room’s response.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally shown to wield recognized authority, with others aligning their reactions to his signal.
